response.justification: The candidate shows well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with sustained TypeScript/Node.js and React work in production settings, including a pricing platform handling millions of transactions and recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, which directly matches a rare requirement of this role. Testing depth is exceptional (TDD practice, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) is demonstrated. Gaps are secondary-stack items: no Nest.js exposure is evident, Kotlin is absent (Java is present but dated), and Vitest/Playwright are not explicitly listed, though the broader testing expertise mitigates this.
strengths: Deep, current TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack experience in production systems at scale
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, matching the role's AI agent requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries, taught testing workshops
concerns: No evident Nest.js experience, the role's primary backend framework
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated, limiting coverage of secondary services
Vitest and Playwright not explicitly demonstrated despite broad testing background
